name: Club Golf Valencia
address: 22945 Soledad Canyon Rd, Santa Clarita, CA 91350
about: Club Golf Valencia is an indoor golf facility in Santa Clarita, California, offering state-of-the-art training and play experiences using Uneekor launch monitor technology. The venue provides a premier golf environment with 16-foot 4K enabled screens and access to over 100 virtual courses. It caters to golfers looking to practice, take lessons, or play year-round, with membership options that include daily play time and discounted lesson rates. The facility is equipped with TPI-certified instructors and a variety of lesson packages, making it suitable for both individual skill development and group activities.
why_golfers_like_it: Uneekor QED launch monitors provide precise real-time data on ball speed, spin, and launch angle for advanced training
Access to over 100 virtual courses including prestigious locations like Pebble Beach and Georgia National
TPI-certified instructors offer structured lesson packages for skill improvement

simulator_hardware.notes: Overhead launch monitor with dual high-speed cameras for real-time club and ball contact analysis

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue doesn't explicitly state whether they provide club rentals, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No information on outside food or drinks is provided. Contact the venue for their policy on bringing your own refreshments.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes isn't specified. Indoor golf typically takes less time than outdoor play, but exact timing depends on simulator software and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific mention of junior programs or family-oriented amenities, though lessons for juniors may be available based on coaching options.
